candidates.note: Evidence Retriever flagged CORE_CITATION_UNVERIFIED on Advocate's central claim; engine correctly forced INSUFFICIENT regardless of skeptic axis sum.
Engine surfaced advocate fabrication: claim 'no IL-13 trial prespecified Th2 stratifier' is empirically false (RAINIER prespecified periostin).

skeptic_critical_flags: Nambiar 2023 (PMID 36857968) placebo-controlled n=12 stage of NCT02874989 OMITTED by advocate; functionally null with AE imbalance
4 of 7 advocate PMIDs hallucinated (Yao 2021, Duckworth 2021, Newton 2022, Liu/Phan 2022)
All clinical D+Q work Mayo/Kirkland-network originating; no external clinical replication
Quercetin dose inconsistency between cited Hickson 2019 and protocol
Telomere-short faster progression but higher dropout/mortality may compromise FVC-slope endpoint

cross_axis_pattern.engine_observation: IPF rescue claims systematically lack published prospective stratifier-specific data.

engine_caught_advocate_fabrications.reality: Raghu 2017 prespecified LOXL2-stratified co-primary endpoints with high-tertile arm; engine flagged via Skeptic adversarial review.

engine_caught_advocate_fabrications.claim: No IPF IL-13 trial prespecified Th2 stratifier
engine_caught_advocate_fabrications.reality: RAINIER itself prespecified periostin (canonical IL-13-induced Th2 marker) subgroup; engine flagged via Skeptic adversarial review.

cross_disease_consistency.DIPG_Tier1_substrate: 0/4 PASS (statistical substrate gate on PBTA v15)
cross_disease_consistency.interpretation: Engine produces differentiated per-disease falsification signatures; rescue substrate quality varies but stratifier_specificity is repeatedly the limiting axis.

follow_on_recommended_next_step: Per the engine Interpreter's follow_on_deployment field, the recommended pre-prospective-trial step for the SUPPORTED candidate (#5 D+Q telomere-short) is ex-vivo IPF lung explant validation (telomere-short donor explants vs telomere-normal, D+Q dose-response on AT2/basaloid p16+ burden + SASP secretome). Four transcript-stratifier candidates (#1 pamrevlumab CTGF, #3 simtuzumab LOXL2, #4 tralokinumab CCL18) remain testable on public GSE47460 (LGRC microarray, no controlled-access gating) in a follow-on Run #2 if a downstream collaborator engages.
